name: Neem Oil Garden Spray
description: A broad-spectrum biological pesticide and fungicide using azadirachtin to disrupt insect life cycles while sparing beneficial insects through its targeted hormonal mechanism.
effectivenessNote: Excellent for prevention + mild infestations. Chemical pesticides faster for severe. Neem's edge: selectivity — spares beneficials. Often better overall for home gardens.
warnings: Slower than chemical pesticides — works over days/weeks
Can harm beneficial insects if sprayed directly on them — apply in evening
scienceNote: Azadirachtin mimics insect hormones disrupting molting/feeding/egg-laying. Biological pathway = beneficials unaffected. Chemical pesticides kill indiscriminately.
